d373a353-66de-4376-ac63-f412d5787e45.label: Bad Bunny Super Bowl
d373a353-66de-4376-ac63-f412d5787e45.file_url: framed as a celebration of Puerto Rican culture, complete with traditional instruments, local iconography, and a reggaetón-heavy setlist—positioned Caribbean expressive culture not as an exotic supplement to American spectacle, but as its organizing center . Even the audience logic shifts here: rather than asking global viewers to understand Spanish, Bad Bunny explicitly reframed participation around feeling and movement (“people only have to worry about dance”)
